reports.emptyDescription: Generate a validation report after completing research and evidence collection.

businessPlan.emptyDescription: Generate a business plan from your validation data and evidence.

prd.emptyDescription: Generate a PRD from your business plan and validation results.

devSpec.emptyDescription: Generate a development spec from your PRD.
devSpec.emptyNoPrdDescription: Create a PRD before generating a development spec.

intelligence.emptyDesc: Create a project to see readiness scores, expert opinions, and recommended actions.
intelligence.actionCenterDesc: Priority actions to improve your validation score
intelligence.expertDesc: Multi-disciplinary perspectives on your startup thesis

expert.insufficient: Insufficient data for a confident opinion. Complete research and validation first.

vc.label: VC Opinion
vc.positive: Market size and business model show investable signals. Due diligence on unit economics recommended.
vc.neutral: Market opportunity is plausible but requires stronger traction and clearer moat before Series A.
vc.negative: Market validation is weak. Revisit TAM analysis and revenue model before investor conversations.

pm.label: PM Opinion
pm.positive: Problem-solution fit is well supported by VOC data. MVP scope can be narrowed confidently.
pm.neutral: Customer pain is documented but sample size is limited. Run more structured interviews.
pm.negative: Problem hypothesis lacks customer evidence. Prioritize discovery before building features.

cto.label: CTO Opinion
cto.positive: Technical execution path is feasible with current evidence base. Architecture decisions can proceed.
cto.neutral: Core technical risks are identified but need deeper validation on scalability and integrations.
cto.negative: Execution feasibility is unclear. Add technical evidence and define MVP architecture.

marketing.label: Marketing Opinion
marketing.positive: Competitive positioning is differentiated. GTM narrative can be sharpened for early adopters.
marketing.neutral: Competitive landscape is mapped but differentiation message needs refinement.
marketing.negative: Market positioning is undifferentiated. Complete competitor analysis and value proposition work.

summary.insufficient: Insufficient validation data. Complete research, VOC, and evidence collection to unlock AI recommendations.
summary.goStrong: Strong GO signal. Market, evidence, and customer data support proceeding with confidence.
summary.go: GO recommendation. Core validation criteria are met with manageable risk.
summary.review: Conditional GO — proceed with targeted improvements in weak score categories.
summary.hold: HOLD recommendation. Critical validation gaps require resolution before investment.
summary.needVoc: Customer evidence is insufficient. VOC collection should be the immediate priority.
summary.needGrants: Government grant mapping is incomplete. Explore funding programs to de-risk capital needs.
summary.needCompetitors: Competitive landscape is under-mapped. Add competitors before final GO decision.
summary.default: Validation in progress. Continue building evidence across all categories.

insights.grantFit: Government grant programs show good fit

summary.strong: Current market evidence is sufficient to support validation decisions.
summary.moderate: Evidence base is growing but high-confidence sources should be expanded.
summary.weak: Evidence is insufficient. Prioritize adding market data and industry reports.

insights.needMore: More evidence needed for reliable AI analysis
insights.addHigh: Add high-confidence sources to strengthen thesis
insights.volume: Increase evidence volume for stronger confidence

summary.strong: VOC coverage is strong. Customer pain and payment intent are well documented.
summary.moderate: VOC data is emerging. Continue interviews to strengthen problem validation.
summary.weak: VOC coverage is insufficient for confident customer validation.

insights.pain: Critical pain points are clearly documented
insights.needPain: Document more critical customer pain points

summary.strong: Multiple grant programs show strong fit for this startup stage.
summary.moderate: Grant opportunities exist but fit scores vary. Review eligibility criteria.
summary.weak: No grant programs mapped. Explore government support options.

insights.fit: Review grant fit scores and eligibility
insights.programs: Add more grant programs to the pipeline

summary.empty: No validation score yet. Run evaluation to unlock AI insights.
summary.go: Validation supports GO. Investment and execution readiness are aligned.
summary.review: Conditional validation — address weak categories before scaling.
summary.hold: Validation indicates significant risk. Revisit core assumptions.

insights.run: Run Validation Score to generate AI analysis

summary.strong: Validation reports are ready for stakeholder distribution.
summary.moderate: Reports in progress. Complete generation for full analysis.
summary.weak: No reports generated. Create a validation report from current data.

summary.moderate: Business plan draft exists. Refine before investor use.
summary.weak: Generate a business plan from validation data.

summary.strong: PRD documents define clear product scope.
summary.moderate: PRD in draft. Complete before development planning.
summary.weak: Create a PRD from business plan and validation results.

summary.strong: Development specs are ready for engineering handoff.
summary.moderate: Dev spec in progress. Complete architecture documentation.

summary.strong: Knowledge base is ready for AI-powered queries.
summary.moderate: Knowledge processing underway. Complete remaining documents.
summary.weak: Process evidence into searchable knowledge for AI analysis.

insights.ready: Knowledge chunks available for AI queries
insights.process: Process evidence to build knowledge base
insights.more: Add more evidence sources for richer AI context

insights.ready: Document ready for review and export

summary.strong: Document portfolio is investor-ready. Review, export, and share with stakeholders.
summary.moderate: Core documents exist. Complete remaining AI Studio outputs for a full package.
summary.weak: No AI documents generated yet. Start with the Validation Report.

summary.strong: Research coverage is comprehensive. Core validation topics are documented.
summary.moderate: Research is underway. Complete remaining plans to strengthen market thesis.
summary.weak: Research coverage is insufficient. Start with market size and customer analysis.

insights.coverage: Research plans cover key validation dimensions
insights.expand: Expand research across market, customer, and competition

summary.strong: Competitive landscape is well mapped with clear positioning.
summary.moderate: Competitor coverage is emerging. Map market positions for differentiation.
summary.weak: Competitive analysis is insufficient. Identify direct competitors first.

insights.needDirect: Add direct competitors to the landscape
insights.positioned: Market positions mapped across key players
insights.mapPosition: Assign market position to each competitor
insights.leaders: Market leaders identified for differentiation strategy
insights.identifyLeaders: Identify market leaders in your category
